commit_scope: Express the ideas router as high-level Form and lift its structure reading into the kernel-router native manifest.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.summary: docs/coherence-substrate/ideas-router.form expresses api/app/routers/ideas.py as a route recipe and deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk now binds /api/ideas/router-structure to a native Form handler. The Rust kernel-router served the route with HTTP 200, Content-Type application/json, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, and the expected source-backed JSON body. Mutable portfolio data routes remain FastAPI fan-out until storage-backed ideas recipes lift.

known_limitations.observed: The manifest evaluates to a route table containing closures; Go/Rust/TypeScript print closure identities differently, so the textual sibling comparison diverges even after the manifest boots and serves through the Rust carrier.
known_limitations.replacement_proof: Rust kernel-router smoke for /api/ideas/router-structure returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router: native-kernel.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native route follow-up commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted in this local route-manifest slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The kernel-router can serve GET /api/ideas/router-structure natively from Form with the high-level ideas-router structure while existing mutable ideas data routes continue to fan out to FastAPI.
test_flows: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py

phase_gate.reason: Local runtime proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
